name: Dying Light
description:
So the Zombie apocalypse is here. That's no good, and so they sent a "tourist" to go handle the problem. To stop a warlord with a highly secret file that could doom millions if released in the state it is in now... you'll help him won't you?

After all the Night is a death sentence, and even with all of this tourist's seemingly amazing skills, is only one man going up against an army. A one man army? Or perhaps An "Army of Two?"

Little reference there. Get it? No? darn...

Anyways enjoy!
creator: FoxiestGooberOAT
